IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: WITH A MISSION TO HELP END HUNGER IN CALIFORNIA, CALFOODS LOGISTICS WORKS WITH PARTNERS TO PROVIDE NUTRITION AND EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE EXPERIENCING FOOD INSECURITY IN ALL 58 COUNTIES.
IRS990.MissionDesc: WITH A MISSION TO HELP END HUNGER IN CALIFORNIA, CALFOODS LOGISTICS WORKS WITH PARTNERS TO PROVIDE NUTRITION AND EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE EXPERIENCING FOOD INSECURITY IN ALL 58 COUNTIES.
IRS990.Desc: TEFAP IS A USDA-FUNDED SUPPLEMENTAL FOOD PROGRAM ADMINISTERED BY THE CDSS. TEFAP PROVIDES ADMINISTRATIVE FUNDS AND USDA COMMODITIES TO A NETWORK OF FOOD BANKS THROUGHOUT CALIFORNIA. TYPICAL ITEMS ARE (SHELF STABLE/DRY/FRESH/FROZEN/BULK PRODUCTS) MILK, PRODUCE, EGGS, PROTEIN. TOTAL POUNDS: 10,345,363

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: DISASTER FOOD ASSISTANCE PROGRAM OR SPECIFIC AREAS AFFECTED BY DECLARED DISASTER (12,972,132 LBS OF FOOD DISTRIBUTED).

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: THE FOOD BOX PROGRAM WAS CREATED BY THE STATE TO QUICKLY GET SUPPLEMENTAL FOOD TO THE MOST VULNERABLE CALIFORNIANS DURING THE COVID-19 PANDEMIC & ECONOMINC DOWN-TURN.TOTAL POUNDS: 4,137,750

ProgSrvcAccomActyOtherGrp.Desc: ALL OTHER PROGRAMS: SDFAP, CALFOOD & TAX CHECKOFF, FOOD BANK PROCUREMENT AND DONATED FOOD. CAPACITY GRANT : INCLUDES VARIOUS PROJECTS FOR FOOD BANK OF NORTHERN NEVADA TO EXPAND SERVICES IN THE REMOTE AREAS OF NORTHER CALIFORNIA. (6,010,870 LBS OF FOOD DISTRIBUTED)

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION IS EXEMPT FROM FEDERAL INCOME TAXES UNDER SECTION 501(C)(3) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE AND STATE INCOME TAXES UNDER SECTION 23701(D) OF THE CALIFORNIA REVENUE TAXATION CODE. ACCORDINGLY, NO PROVISION FOR INCOME TAXES HAS BEEN MADE IN THE ACCOMPANYING STATEMENTS. ACCOUNTING PRINCIPLES GENERALLY ACCEPTED IN THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA PROVIDE ACCOUNTING AND DISCLOSURE GUIDANCE ABOUT POSITIONS TAKEN BY AN ORGANIZATION IN ITS TAX RETURNS THAT MIGHT BE UNCERTAIN. MANAGEMENT HAS CONSIDERED ITS TAX POSITIONS AND BELIEVES THAT ALL OF THE POSITIONS TAKEN BY THE ORGANIZATION IN ITS FEDERAL AND STATE EXEMPT ORGANIZATION TAX RETURNS ARE MORE-LIKELY-THAN-NOT TO BE SUSTAINED UPON EXAMINATION.

RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY OF BUTTE COUNTY
COMMUNITY FOOD BANK OF SAN BENITO COUNTY
FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER OF THE REDWOODS
FOOD BANK OF EL DORADO COUNTY
FOOD BANK OF SANTA BARBARA COUNTY
JACOBS AND CUSHMAN SAN DIEGO FOOD BANK
MENDOCINO FOOD AND NUTRITION PROGRAM INC
SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY AGING & COMM SERVICES
SECOND HARVEST FOOD BANK OF SANTA CRUZ COUNTY
SECOND HARVEST OF THE GREATER VALLEY

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: FINANCE WORKS WITH OPERATIONS TO ENSURE INVOICES PAID ARE IN ALIGNMENT WITH THE BUDGET FOR A PARTICULAR PROGRAM. ADDITIONALLY, EACH INVOICE PAID (FOOD, FREIGHT, INCENTIVES) ARE DERIVED FROM THE ORDER CONFIRMATION AND THE PROGRAM IS ATTACHED TO THE ORDER CONFIRMATION AT INCEPTION. ALL COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH THE ORDER FALL IN LINE WITH THAT PROGRAM.
BONUSES FOR EXECUTIVE COMPENSATION DURING THE 2023 CALENDAR YEAR WERE DISCRETIONARY AND GIVEN BASED ON PERFORMANCE.
THE NUMBER REPRESENTS THE NUMBER OF CONTRIBUTORS, NOT ITEMS CONTRIBUTED.
THE ORGANIZATION WRAPPED UP TWO PROGRAMS CONTRACTED WITH THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF SOCIAL SERVICES. THE FOOD BOX PROGRAM (FBP) AS WELL AS DROUGHT FOOD ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS (DFAP) CAME TO AN END.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: OLIVIA LINKHART IS RELATED TO THE CEO, STEVEN LINKHART.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS WILL BE PROVIDED A COPY OF THE 990 DRAFT BEFORE IT IS SIGNED AND FILED. THE BOARD WILL BE GIVEN THREE DAYS TO REVIEW AND IF NECESSARY, MAKE COMMENTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY IS CERTIFIED ANNUALLY AT THE START OF EACH FISCAL YEAR BY OFFICERS AND KEY EMPLOYEES. THE MONITORING OF THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY IS HANDLED BY THE BOARD CHAIR.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION USES THE NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS SURVEY TO DETERMINE COMPENSATION FOR OFFICERS AND KEY EMPLOYEES. THE BOARD APPROVES THE COMPENSATION AND THE LAST REVIEW WAS CONDUCTED NOVEMBER 2024.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AND OTHER GOVERNING DOCUMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC ON ITS WEBSITE, CHARITY NAVIGATOR, AND GUIDESTAR.
